title.en: Before you know it, hundreds of years have passed.

content.en:
Time flies.

Before you know it, hundreds of years have passed.

Ye Tian used this thousand drops of Heavenly Blood Xuan Marrow to continuously improve his cultivation, and his aura slowly increased, and finally on this day, he raised his cultivation to the peak realm of the Fifth Rank Dao Realm.

Subsequently.

He spent another dozens of Supreme Dao Epochs to raise his cultivation to his current limit.

At this time, there were still more than a hundred drops of Heavenly Blood Myeloid left.

"If your cultivation reaches the current limit, you can go to the Sixfold Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

With his current Sixth Sequence to the Dao Rule Realm, plus some other resources, the chance of impacting the Sixfold Dao Realm is naturally very high.

If it were anyone else, they would definitely buy some secret potions that could provide a success rate, and the Winter Night Fortress also had similar secret medicines.

However, those secret medicines are very expensive, and the secret medicines that are useful to him cannot be exchanged for millions of combat exploits.

He already has a high success rate, there is no need to exchange it to buy this secret medicine, or directly choose to break through, even if the impact fails, he can continue to impact.

"Start impacting the Sixfold Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian used the sixth sequence of the Ten Perfection Realm to help him attack the sixth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules, and he also used a lot of resources, and even the remaining more than a hundred drops of Heavenly Blood Xuan Marrow were also used.

Rumble!!!!

Under the continuous impact, the bottleneck of the sixfold Dao realm gradually cracked.

Click!

The bottleneck was completely broken, Ye Tian's body began to transform, and his cultivation gradually stepped into the early stage of the sixfold Dao realm.

......

Somewhere in the Winter Night Fortress.

Su Ya looked at Ye Tian's retreat and smiled slightly: "Ye Tian seems to have broken through, with his strength, plus the Sixfold Dao Realm of the other supreme supreme supreme paths, the success rate is almost more than ninety percent. "

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian's cultivation was completely stabilized at the early stage of the Sixfold Dao Realm.

Then, he came to Su Ya.

"Lord Su Domain, I have broken through!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Commander Ye, I need to sit here, I can't leave for the time being, I will let an eightfold Dao realm to take you there. Su Ya said.

If it's another time, it doesn't matter if she's away for a while.

But now is a special period, as one of the domain masters of the Winter Night Fortress, all of them are not allowed to leave, such a top combat power, leaving one will greatly reduce the strength of the Winter Night Fortress.

Therefore, he could only take Ye Tian from the other eightfold to the Dao realm to leave the Winter Night Fortress.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Soon, an eightfold Dao realm named Su Yu came to the Winter Night Fortress, Ye Tian followed him out of the Winter Night Fortress, and then after several transfers, he came to the Tianxun Fortress.

Here, the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm, which has taken the path of the strongest and most supreme path, gathers here.

And Ye Tian had also seen the Taibai Sword Master from the Infinite Domain.

"Taibai Sword Master!"

Ye Tian came to the Taibai Sword Master.

The Taibai Sword Lord didn't know Ye Tian, and when he went to the Infinite Domain to help, Ye Tian was still very weak, so naturally they hadn't met.

"Your Excellency is ......"

The Taibai Sword Lord asked.

"Infinite Domain, Taisu Palace Ye Tian!" Ye Tian said.

"You're actually from Taisu Palace!" the Taibai Sword Lord was extremely surprised.

In his opinion, Taisu Palace was very weak, and it was unlikely that he would have such a demonic Supreme Dao Realm.

But as he chatted, he knew that Ye Tiancai had broken through to the Sixfold Dao Realm not long ago, and he understood.

As time passed, more and more of the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realms gathered here, all of them taking the path of the Supreme Path, and everyone stayed here and waited for others.

It took Ye Tian a long time to break through, and the other six realms didn't need to be like this, so it didn't take long for them to arrive.

Then.

A Ninefold Dao Realm powerhouse appeared.

"Hello everyone, I am Su Xiang, the Wanxiang Heavenly Emperor from the Sioux Clan, this time we will take you to that strange place, and now, I will make one of you the captain, and all commands will obey the captain. Su Xiang said.

Many of the Sixfold Dao Realms looked at each other, wondering who would become the captain, although there was no substantial benefit to becoming the captain, but at least it proved their strength!

"Ye Tian, you will be the captain!"

The Heavenly Emperor of Wanxiang looked at Ye Tian.

At this time, many of the Sixfold Dao Realms were shocked, most of their cultivation was at the peak of the Sixfold Dao Realm, a few were in the late stage of the Sixfold Dao Realm, and Ye Tian was only in the early stage of the Sixfold Dao Realm!

Why did Ye Tian become the captain?

At this time, a Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm questioned: "Lord Wanxiang Heavenly Emperor, Ye Tian is only in the early stage of the Sixfold Dao Realm, with his strength is not enough to become our captain, the captain should be the most powerful one!"

Wanxiang Heavenly Emperor sneered: "Ye Tian has comprehended the sixth sequence of supreme dao rules, and his combat power is stronger than yours, if you comprehend the sixth sequence of supreme dao rules, you can also become the captain." If there is no Ye Tian, the success rate of this plan is less than one percent!"

"He comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules!"

The other sixfold realms are no longer questioned.

Of course, there were also people who questioned in their hearts that Ye Tian had comprehended the rules of the Sixth Sequence of the Supreme Dao with something like the Purple Ruins Devouring Stone, but in any case, the Su clan didn't value anything else, only whether they could kill the Dao Strange Thing for them, and nothing else mattered.

"If you don't have an opinion, let's go now!"

Wanxiang Heavenly Emperor said.

"No comments!"

Many sixfold to the Dao realm respond to the Dao.

......

Ye Tian and the others followed the Ten Thousand Phases Heavenly Emperor to secretly leave from the Void Domain, and were led by the Ten Thousand Phases Heavenly Emperor to shuttle, and the speed was extremely fast.

Every breath is a long frontier.

That strange place was somewhere in the Void Domain, and the Sioux didn't want to be known by other forces, after all, there was also a lot of competition within the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and it was impossible to be completely united.

What's more, an item containing the rules of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao is enough for the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm to fight, and one more such item is enough to cultivate a new Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm!

I don't know how long it has been.

The destination has arrived!

"Where is this?"

Ye Tian found that his perception of the main body was very vague, and the rules of the Supreme Dao here were extremely distorted.

And ahead, a strange world emerges.

That strange world is the strange place this time.

"This strange place is very special, there is a black aura in it that can corrode your origin, you wear this leaf, you can block the origin from being corroded, and then kill that Dao strange thing as soon as possible. After the Heavenly Emperor of Ten Thousand Phases distributed the purple leaves, he reminded.

Then, the Wanxiang Heavenly Emperor took out another stone tablet: "This is the Zhenyu Dao Monument, which can weaken the strength of the Dao Strange Things, and you can all divide a wisp of will into it, and you can join hands to control this Zhenyu Dao Monument!"

"Hmm!"

Many sixfold to the Dao realm respond to the Dao.

Immediately, under the leadership of Ye Tian, they directly broke into this strange place.

Next, they only need to lure out the Dao Strange Thing and slay it.
